code: import React from'react';import'./Sidebar.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const NAV=[{id:'home',icon:'🏠',label:'Dashboard'},{id:'compare',icon:'🌍',label:'Compare'},{id:'favourites',icon:'⭐',label:'Favourites'}];const Sidebar=_ref=>{let{activeTab,setActiveTab,theme,toggleTheme}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("aside",{className:"sidebar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"sidebar-logo",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"logo-icon",children:"\uD83C\uDF24\uFE0F"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:"sidebar-nav",children:NAV.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:`nav-btn ${activeTab===item.id?'active':''}`,onClick:()=>setActiveTab(item.id),title:item.label,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-icon",children:item.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-tooltip",children:item.label})]},item.id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"sidebar-bottom",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:"theme-btn",onClick:toggleTheme,title:theme==='light'?'Switch to Dark Mode':'Switch to Light Mode',children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:theme==='light'?'🌙':'☀️'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-tooltip",children:theme==='light'?'Dark Mode':'Light Mode'})]})})]});};export default Sidebar;
